title: Deep Space Probe Coloring Page

funFacts: Rockets burn liquid or solid propellants to generate thrust, accelerating to escape velocity of 25,000 mph to reach orbit.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing intricate color highlighting using fine-tip gel pens.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about historical events and cultural legends while developing fine motor coordination.
